checkout.couldNotStart: Could not start checkout. Please try again.
checkout.missingCustomer: No Stripe customer for this organization.

planLimits.graceActive: You're over your plan cap, with {{daysLeft}} days left in your grace period.
planLimits.graceExpired: Your grace period has ended. Reduce usage or upgrade your plan.
planLimits.warnApproaching: You're approaching your plan's {{name}} limit ({{count}} of {{cap}}).

portal.couldNotOpen: Could not open the billing portal. Please try again.

cardFooter.activateOnly: Stripe Checkout opens only when you choose to activate billing.
cardFooter.createFirst: Create your account first, then continue to Stripe Checkout.

campus.name: Campus
campus.tagline: Premium tier for a single school — adds the parent & family app, higher caps, and dedicated support.

carLine.name: Car Line
carLine.tagline: Run dismissal smoothly with a staff-only viewer. Best for smaller schools.

district.footer: No credit card required. We'll reach out during your trial to discuss your district's setup.
district.name: District
district.tagline: For districts running more than one school.

afterTrial.a: If you haven't converted, your site is suspended. No surprise charges.

creditCard.q: Do I need a credit card to start?

switchTiers.a: Yes, contact us to upgrade or downgrade anytime.

hardship.heading: Mid-year sign-ups & small private schools
hardship.body: Joining mid-school-year, or running a small private school where the listed pricing isn’t workable? Mention it during your free trial — our team will work with you on pricing.

campus.brand: Full custom branding — logo upload + custom domain
campus.drillReplay: Drill replay timeline — scrub every action with timestamp and actor
campus.rfid: RFID vehicle-tag auto-arrival available as a custom add-on (pricing scoped per deployment)

carLine.brand: Pick your brand colors (no logo upload)
carLine.staffViewer: Teacher & staff viewer only (no parent or family app)

district.addOn: Additional schools available as an add-on
district.rfid: RFID vehicle-tag auto-arrival available as a custom add-on (pricing scoped per deployment)

pricing.heading: Pricing
pricing.lede: Pick the tier that matches your school or district, then continue through signup. Self-serve plans can move straight into checkout, and district setups stay custom.
pricing.metaDescription: Simple pricing for schools and districts. Pick a plan, create your account, and continue through signup or checkout.

suspension.pastDue: Your subscription is past due. Update your payment method to avoid suspension.
suspension.suspended: Your account is suspended. Contact support or update billing to restore access.

trial.expired: Your free trial has ended. Upgrade to continue recording pickups.
